description: Baseline config for all English-only Q8/4096 comparisons.
command: Which English-only Q8/4096 settings improve held-out TTS quality on the frozen Emilia-40k subset?
Baseline config for all English-only Q8/4096 comparisons.
command_str: /home/pranav/TINYYAYAy/llama-mimi/.venv/bin/python scripts/exp/launch.py --mode modal --config codecs/mimi/configs/tinyaya_mimi_q8_s4096_emilia40k_en.toml --modal-path mimi/ablation_emilia40k_q8_s4096_en --experiment-id exp-20260316-134819-shortlist10k-anchor-anchor-s0 --campaign-id emilia40k-wave1 --phase mimi_q8_s4096_emilia40k_en_ablation --stage shortlist10k --variant anchor --track english_only --axis anchor --family mimi_q8_s4096 --question 'Which English-only Q8/4096 settings improve held-out TTS quality on the frozen Emilia-40k subset?' --hypothesis 'Baseline config for all English-only Q8/4096 comparisons.' --owner codex --codec mimi --tags tinyaya,tts,mimi,q8,4096,emilia40k,english,shortlist10k,anchor,anchor,seed0 --override optimizer.lr=5e-05 --override training.global_batch_size=16 --override training.max_audio_seconds=16 --override training.steps=10000 --override 'training.dataset_path="/vol/data/emilia_en40k_mimi_q8"' --override 'training.dataset="tts_pretok"' --override 'validation.dataset="tts_pretok"' --override 'validation.split="validation"' --override validation.seq_len=4096 --override validation.local_batch_size=2 --override training.local_batch_size=1 --override training.seq_len=4096 --override training.language_tokens=false --override 'training.languages=[]' --override training.sample_generate_every=500 --override training.sample_generate_num_samples=2 --override training.sample_generate_do_sample=false --override training.sample_generate_restrict_audio_vocab=true --override training.log_target_media=true --override training.log_unconstrained_named_media=false --override model.num_quantizers=8 --override tts_eval.enabled=true --override tts_eval.eval_every=10000 --override tts_eval.full_pack_enabled=true --override tts_eval.full_pack_eval_every=10000 --override tts_eval.full_pack_max_samples=1000 --override checkpoint.enable_checkpoint=true --override checkpoint.interval=10000 --override lr_scheduler.warmup_steps=400 --override training.seed=0 --override training.deterministic=true
